SELECT
    blocked_locks.pid AS blocked_pid,
    blocked_locks.mode AS blocked_mode,
    blocking_locks.pid AS blocking_pid,
    blocking_locks.mode AS blocking_mode,
    blocked_activity.query AS blocked_query,
    blocking_activity.query AS blocking_query,
    blocked_activity.wait_event,
    blocked_activity.wait_event_type,
    blocked_activity.wait_event_info,
    blocked_activity.state,
    blocked_activity.backend_type,
    blocked_activity.client_addr,
    blocked_activity.client_hostname,
    blocked_activity.application_name,
    blocked_activity.usename,
    blocked_activity.query_start,
    blocked_activity.state_change,
    blocked_activity.backend_xid,
    blocked_activity.backend_xmin,
    blocked_activity.backend_xmax,
    blocked_activity.backend_lock_external,
    blocked_activity.backend_lock_pid,
    blocked_activity.backend_lock_mode,
    blocked_activity.backend_lock_obj_id,
    blocked_activity.backend_lock_obj_relid,
    blocked_activity.backend_lock_obj_subid,
    blocked_activity.backend_lock_virtualxid,
    blocked_activity.backend_lock_transactionid,
    blocked_activity.backend_lock_pid,
    blocked_activity.backend_lock_mode,
    blocked_activity.backend_lock_obj_id,
    blocked_activity.backend_lock_obj_relid,
    blocked_activity.backend_lock_obj_subid,
    blocked_activity.backend_lock_virtualxid,
    blocked_activity.backend_lock_transactionid
FROM
    pg_catalog.pg_locks blocked_locks
JOIN
    pg_catalog.pg_stat_activity blocked_activity ON blocked_activity.pid = blocked_locks.pid
JOIN
    pg_catalog.pg_locks blocking_locks ON blocking_locks.locktype = blocked_locks.locktype
    AND blocking_locks.DATABASE IS NOT DISTINCT FROM blocked_locks.DATABASE
    AND blocking_locks.relation IS NOT DISTINCT FROM blocked_locks.relation
    AND blocking_locks.page IS NOT DISTINCT FROM blocked_locks.page
    AND blocking_locks.tuple IS NOT DISTINCT FROM blocked_locks.tuple
    AND blocking_locks.virtualxid IS NOT DISTINCT FROM blocked_locks.virtualxid
    AND blocking_locks.transactionid IS NOT DISTINCT FROM blocked_locks.transactionid
    AND blocking_locks.classid IS NOT DISTINCT FROM blocked_locks.classid
    AND blocking_locks.objid IS NOT DISTINCT FROM blocked_locks.objid
    AND blocking_locks.objsubid IS NOT DISTINCT FROM blocked_locks.objsubid
    AND blocking_locks.pid != blocked_locks.pid
JOIN
    pg_catalog.pg_stat_activity blocking_activity ON blocking_activity.pid = blocking_locks.pid
WHERE
    NOT blocked_locks.GRANTED
ORDER BY
    blocked_activity.query_start;

    AND blocking_locks.page IS NOT DISTINCT FROM blocked_locks.page

    AND blocking_locks.objsubid IS NOT DISTINCT FROM blocked_locks.objsubid
